title: rosa viscaria var. oblongicarpa
intro: Rosa viscaria var. oblongicarpa, also known as the alpine rose or viscaria rose, is a plant species native to the alpine regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of tannins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rosa viscaria var. oblongicarpa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications such as salves and creams to support skin health and promote tissue repair.
